_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the path-safety blacklist shared by Node (src/server/utils/path-safety.ts) and Rust (src-tauri/src/commands.rs::validate_file_path). Both sides keep their own compiled-in copies (Node can't invoke Rust; Rust shouldn't read a file at runtime for a security list), and each has a test asserting its in-code list equals this fixture: Node path-safety-crosscheck.unit.test.ts, Rust commands.rs::path_safety_crosscheck_tests. To change the blacklist: edit BOTH code sites AND this file — any drift between a code site and this fixture fails that side's test. (PRD 0.2.15 §7.2.)
